description: This table provides information about historic institutions and their modern counterparts, focusing on locations and buildings designed by Clarence H. Johnston Sr. It highlights architectural contributions to various institutions and their transformations over time. The table serves as a reference for understanding Johnston's impact on institutional architecture.
